articles.title: Elon Musk’s Megapacks: Empowering Belgium’s Grid Resilience
articles.description: Elon Musk’s Master Plan for Global Energy Elon Musk has long championed a sustainable energy revolution, assuring us, “Earth will move to a sustainable energy economy, and it will happen in your lifetime.” His Tesla Master Plan Part 3 outlined the scale: “The world needs 30 terawatts of renewable power, and 240 TWh of energy […]
articles.author: Gail Alfar

articles.title: Starlink offers free internet for flood survivors in Indonesia
articles.description:
As Indonesia continues to be battered by monsoon rains and deadly floods across North Sumatra, West Sumatra and Aceh, Starlink is stepping up to help. The damage is extreme in North and West Sumatra, with […]

The post Starlink offers free internet for flood survivors in Indonesia appeared first on Drive Tesla.
articles.author: Scott Nordlund

articles.title: Tesla FSD Wins Big New Testing Approval in Spain
articles.description:
Tesla’s push to bring Full Self-Driving (Supervised) to Europe continues picking up momentum, with Spain now emerging as one of the most important testing hubs under the country’s new Evaluation of the Safety and Technology of Automated Vehicles (ES-AV) framework. The Dirección General de Tráfico (DGT) published updated authorization data this week, confirming Tesla is […]

The post Tesla FSD Wins Big New Testing Approval in Spain appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.
articles.author: Nehal Malik

articles.title: Tesla Begins Deliveries of Striking New Marine Blue Model Y
articles.description:
Tesla has officially begun delivering Model Ys in its newly introduced Marine Blue paint finish, marking the first customer handovers of the colorway in Europe following its initial launch last month. The new shade — developed at Tesla’s advanced multi-layer paint facility at Gigafactory Berlin-Brandenburg — caught significant attention when it debuted in Europe as […]

The post Tesla Begins Deliveries of Striking New Marine Blue Model Y appeared first on TeslaNorth.com.

articles.description:

posts.text: Tesla’s new free trial of FSD (Supervised) V14 for the ~1.5 million HW4 Tesla owners in North America who haven’t purchased FSD is actually a roughly 40 day free trial, not 30-day. That means people will be able to use FSD through Christmas, into New Year’s, and a bit after. https://t.co/hzdrJa8lSZ
posts.name: Sawyer Merritt

posts.text: Not sure if Tesla’s ambient LEDs can do that, but it’d be great if we could customize each zone’s color (each door, dashboard, etc.). posts.text:
What surprised me about civil litigation is that you're not really arguing about the substance of the lawsuit at all. That is almost never discussed.

Rather, most of the arguments are really about procedural technicalities. Like a missing semi-colon that throws up a compiler
